generations.full_prompt:

VISUALIZATION TYPE: 1. Infographic type: Process flow  
2. Main sections: Identify Blockers, Fix Dashboard Bugs, Remove Text Limits, Integrate Decentralized Identity (SAID Protocol), Apply to Core & Plugins, Ready for Beta Launch  
3. Key icons: Bug/alert symbol, text/document icon, shield/network symbol (for identity), plugin/puzzle piece, launch/rocket

   - Clear Blockers  
   - Debug Dashboard  
   - Remove Text Limits  
   - Integrate SAID Protocol  
   - Framework & Plugin Registry  
   - Beta Launch Ready

CONTENT CONTEXT:
Focus on clearing functional blockers for the official beta launch, including dashboard bug fixes and removing text limits. Integration of decentralized identity standards through the SAID Protocol across the core framework and plugin registry.

STYLE: Flat design icons, isometric elements, clean visual hierarchy with labels. Professional editorial clarity.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Professional infographic/dashboard quality
- Clean, polished vector aesthetic
- Include section headers and labels where appropriate
- Strategic use of color to highlight key insights
- Editorial publication quality
- Modern, sophisticated design, modern infographic, flat design, isometric, professional, editorial quality
